name: Haunted by Fat Ghost Ass
description:
I don't fucking know what to put here and I'll figure it out later.
⊰ ⛧ ⊱

Not based on any characters in particular, just ghosts, fear boners and giant fucking ass.

Decided to experiment with writing the bot in bare bones raw text, because I was wondering how good it would function, and suprisingly, it functions extremely well. I was testing it on SpicyChat while the website was down, but I'm pretty sure it should perform here as well?

The main inspiration for this bot, and the old picture I used for this bot before the filter/placeholder update shit, is the third image on this pixiv post. Altought I am not that big if a fan of the rest of the stuff they've drawn, check out at your own risk.
However, a secondary inspiration for this bot, if you want to have a better look at the ghost haunting you, is a far better piece from a far better artist honestly, this art by Exobelos.

The CURRENT image the bot is using is a shitty crop edit of THIS pixiv post which has NOTHING to do with the bot whatsoever but it was like the ONLY thing that looked even vaguely like an ass against the window and WASN'T obnoxiously NSFW

very nice art tbh, I love it.

Oh yeah just so people who actually expect custom tags in the description can find this bot in the search bar let me just mention some keywords real fast: Hyper, Anal, Pale, Undead
creator: Maxience
